lenis_setup.name: Lenis Smooth Scroll Setup
lenis_setup.notes: Always initialize Lenis first at the root level of the app. Ensure ScrollTrigger is registered before creating the Lenis instance.

echo_text.name: RXK Echo Text
echo_text.notes: Ensures the typographic signature of RXK. Best applied on heavy sans-serif headers.

velocity_cursor.name: Velocity Cursor
velocity_cursor.notes: Stretch ratio maps to speed velocity, recreating the Aristide Benoist standard.

magnetic_element.name: Magnetic Hover
magnetic_element.notes: Magnetic attraction pulls element coordinates toward user mouse pointers.

word_reveal.name: Word Reveal
word_reveal.notes: Cinematic text reveal using nested mask selectors. Prevents container offsets.

glitch_counter.name: Glitch Counter
glitch_counter.notes: Monospaced counter with technical preloader glitch animations.

horizontal_scroll.name: Horizontal Section Scroll
horizontal_scroll.notes: Pins layout vertically while scrolling panel tracks horizontally.

color_shift.name: Color Shift Interpolation
color_shift.notes: Smooth canvas background interpolation. Prevents high rendering costs.

sticky_narrative.name: Sticky Narrative Layout
sticky_narrative.notes: Locks left narrative copy in place while right-hand images scroll by.

image_reveal_clip.name: Image Clip-Path Reveal
image_reveal_clip.notes: Wipes away mask borders using responsive CSS inset clip-paths.

page_transition.name: Page Wipe Transition

physics_stickers.name: Rapier Physics Stickers
physics_stickers.notes: Draggable stickers simulation using Rapier WASM physics bounds.

webgl_noise_plane.name: WebGL Noise Plane Shader
webgl_noise_plane.notes: Custom GLSL noise background shader. Low performance costs.

video_scrub.name: Video Frame Scrub
video_scrub.notes: Coordinates video playback frames to user scroll positions.

marquee_track.name: Infinite Marquee Ticker
marquee_track.notes: Offsets lists infinitely. Duplicates list elements dynamically.

loader_designed.name: Lempens Awards Loader
loader_designed.notes: Lempens-tier load screens. Previews SOTD award achievements.

post_processing.name: Three.js Post-Processing
post_processing.notes: Applies chromatic aberrations, lens blur, and light bloom passes.

sound_manager.name: Howler Spatial Sound Manager
sound_manager.notes: Manages sound asset playbacks tuned to scroll velocity hooks.
